Everest 是 Celeste 的开源模组加载器和模组 API，允许您根据自: Everest is an open-source mod loader and modding API for Celeste that allows you to create custom map packs, texture replacements, and code mods according to your preferences. Modding requires Everest to be installed. CeleMod can assist you in downloading and installing Everest with just one click.
将无法继续使用: you won't be able to continue using it.
在境内可以正常使用游戏内的下载和更新: &&In mainland China, game's internal downloads and updates can be used normally.
提供比异变更多的改变游戏画面、内容、玩法的选项: Provides more options to change the game's visuals, content, and gameplay than variants.
实时存档读档（SL）、调试地图和传送、速通计时器、一键望远镜等: Real-time save/load (SL), debugging maps and teleportation, speedrun timer, one-click telescope, etc.
用于编写TAS，也可以显示碰撞箱、数值面板等: Used for writing TAS, can also display collision boxes, numerical panels, etc.
生成随机地图，可用于联机: Generate random maps, can be used for online play.
随机地图菜单中文翻译: Translation of Random Map Menu in Chinese
实时显示死亡次数: Display Death Count in Real Time
标记每次死亡的位置: Mark the Location of Each Death
指示附近的收集品、将身后的草莓变透明: Indicate Nearby Collectibles and Make Strawberries Behind Transparent
提供更多、更完整的存档备份: Provide more complete backup of save files.
给一次性水晶加上红色边框: Give one-time crystal a red border.
优化冰墙显示，具有减小贴图厚度等多种选项: Optimize ice wall display, with options to reduce texture thickness, etc.
给移动块加上白色边框，避免因为背景太黑了看不到: Add white border to moving blocks to avoid them being invisible due to a dark background.
彩虹头、双马尾皮肤: Rainbow head and twin tails skin
用星星代替金旗: Use Stars instead of Gold Flag

全蔚蓝最大的地图集，涵盖多个难度，美术优秀，地图有趣，适合新手和老玩家: The biggest atlas of the whole blue blue cover multiple difficulties, excellent art, interesting maps, suitable for novices and old players

独立地图，酱一难度，比较宁静，官图A面过后可打: Independent map, the sauce is difficult, more peaceful, the official map A can be played after the side A
独立地图，酱二红难度，老图，要求: Independent map, the difficulty of sauce two red, old map, requirements
这里将会列出一些推荐安装的地图及其简介，请按需安装: Here we will list some recommended maps and profiles, please install it on demand
最为经典的地图集，于 2023 年推出: The most classic atlas, launched in 2023
质量极高，每张图都有自己的特色；背景音乐与环境制作精良: The quality is extremely high, each picture has its own characteristics; the background music and environment are well -made
分为五个难度（即酱一至酱五），从刚入门的新手到千小时的老鸟都可以打~: It is divided into five difficulty (that is, one to five sauce), from the newbies just started to the thousand -hour old birds can be played ~
包含超过20张地图和一个极其漂亮的大厅: Including more than 20 ground maps and an extremely beautiful hall
涵盖酱一至酱五所有难度，数种与众不同的新机制等待玩家去探索: Cover all the difficulty of the sauce one to five sauce, several new mechanisms that are different in the public are waiting for players to explore
国人原创图，国风浓厚，难度偏高，美术优美，音乐好听，非常推荐安装尝试: Original pictures of Chinese people, the national style is strong, the difficulty is high, the art is beautiful, the music is good, it is recommended to install and try it very much
包含80+地图，5个章节，数十种新机制: Including 80+ maps, 5 chapters, dozens of new mechanisms
Spring Collab 有 5 个大厅供您探索，里面装满了社区制作的地图。地: Spring Collab has 5 halls for you to explore, which is filled with maps made by community. The difficulty of the map is covered from the early original content to some existing most difficult CeleSte maps.
老牌地图，比草莓酱简单，还行: Old maps are simpler than strawberry sauce and OK
单图，美术和音乐都很好: Single pictures, art and music are very good
MB 自己很喜欢的一张图，有 20-30 面，感觉很平和（中文名是自己翻译的）: MB's favorite picture, with 20-30 faces, feels very peaceful (the Chinese name is my own translation)
A 面难度在 5A - 6A，B面/C面有一些技巧，难度在 7B 的样子: A side difficulty in 5A -6A, B -side/C side has some skills, the difficulty is 7b, it looks like 7B

注意，该功能不支持通配符等: Note that this function does not support wildcard characters, etc.

当前未选中 profile，更新后保持默认启用状态。: No profile is currently selected. Updates will keep mods enabled by default.
更新完成后会重新应用 {profileName}。: {profileName} will be reapplied after the update finishes.
SL、调试地图、计时与练习工作流的核心工具。: A core tool for save/load, debug maps, timing, and practice workflows.
TAS 编写与碰撞箱、数值调试工具。: TAS authoring plus hitbox and value debugging tools.
Wayland 诊断有待处理项: Wayland diagnostics still have items to review
不碰玩法，只给角色、拖尾和界面增加辨识度。: Leave gameplay untouched and focus on character, trail, and UI identity.
中国玩家制作的地图集，量不大但美术很强。: A map pack made by Chinese players. Smaller in scope, but artistically strong.
中文环境常用的群服联机模组。: A commonly used multiplayer mod for Chinese-speaking players.
仅做诊断提示，不会阻止程序启动。: This only adds diagnostics warnings and does not block startup.
仅在需要进一步压制渲染问题时启用。: Enable only when you need to suppress rendering issues further.
任务记录现在独立成全局浮层，Home / Search / Manage 都能打: Task history now lives in a global overlay that can be opened from Home, Search, and Manage.
优先走 Wegfan 提供的下载接口，中文环境下默认使用。: Prefer the Wegfan download endpoint. This is the default for Chinese environments.
体量极大的地图集，覆盖多个难度段。: A huge map pack that covers multiple difficulty ranges.
依赖处理完成，安装 {installedCount}，失败 {failedCou: Dependency handling finished: installed {installedCount}, failed {failedCount}, still unresolved {unresolvedCount}.
保存后需重启应用，启动阶段变量才会完全按新配置生效。: Restart the app after saving so startup-time variables fully use the new configuration.
保持启用，不改 profile: Keep enabled, do not modify profiles
先回到主页载入一个游戏目录，再进入管理工作台。: Load a game directory from Home first, then come back to the management workspace.
先回到原版的两类心智模型：功能性模组和外观模组。后续会继续补更接近原版的分组和文: Return to the original two mental models first: utility mods and cosmetic mods. The grouping and copy will keep moving closer to the original later.
先恢复原版的常用模组入口。: Bring back the original common mod entry points first.
先放最常见的大型图包和几张代表性的独立地图。: Start with the most common large collabs and a few representative standalone maps.
先补一组真正提升游玩和调试效率的工具类模组。: Start with a set of utility mods that genuinely improve play and debugging efficiency.
这里填写的是 Celeste 安装目录，不是单独的 Everest 路径。Eve: The path here is the Celeste installation directory, not a separate Everest path. Once installed, Everest lives in the same directory, so version detection, launching, and mod management all continue to use this directory.
Everest 是安装在当前 Celeste 目录中的 Mod 加载器。这里不会: Everest is the mod loader installed inside the current Celeste directory. This page does not ask for a separate Everest path; it installs or updates directly against the current workspace.
先载入一个游戏目录，再使用推荐安装。: Load a game directory first before using recommendations.
先载入一个游戏目录，再安装 Everest。: Load a game directory first before installing Everest.
先载入一个游戏目录，再执行安装。: Load a game directory first before installing.
先载入一个游戏目录，再读取 profile 列表。: Load a game directory first before reading the profile list.
先选中一个 profile，再调整顺序。: Select a profile first before adjusting the order.
Stable 通道会跟随当前下载镜像切换；Beta / Dev 继续使用上游构建: The Stable channel follows the current download mirror, while Beta / Dev continue to use upstream build URLs. Installation always targets the current Celeste workspace.
切换后会影响在线搜索结果中的下载地址、管理页更新检测、缺失依赖补全，以及安装时自: Changing this affects download URLs in search results, update detection in Manage, missing dependency repair, and the source used when installs auto-resolve dependencies.
切换语言后会立即重绘整个应用 shell，推荐页和状态消息也会一起切换。: Changing the language redraws the entire app shell immediately, including recommendation pages and status messages.
测试通道更新更快，但默认直接走上游构建地址。: Test channels update faster, but use upstream build URLs directly by default.
勾选表示该 Mod 在当前 profile 中保持启用；取消勾选表示写入该 pr: Checked means the mod stays enabled in the current profile. Unchecked means it is written into that profile blacklist. Changes only touch the profile until you click "Apply Current Profile" and write them to `Mods/blacklist.txt`.
启动时将当前运行时环境和警告打印到 stderr。: Print the current runtime environment and warnings to stderr during startup.
在大地图中按 M 打开 Collab 地图选择器。: Press M on a collab lobby map to open the collab map selector.
大型图包和代表性独立地图先独立成页，避免和常用模组列表搅在一起。: Separate large collabs and representative standalone maps into their own page first, instead of mixing them into the common mod list.
安装后应用当前选中 profile: Reapply the currently selected profile after install
安装完成后会重新应用 {targetProfile}，把它对应的 blackli: After installation, {targetProfile} will be reapplied and its blacklist state will be written back to disk.
安装完成，主模组 {modName} v{version}，策略：{strate: Install complete: main mod {modName} v{version}, strategy: {strategy}{dependencySuffix}
安装有效，但未检测到 Everest: Valid install, but Everest was not detected
实时显示死亡次数。: Show death count in real time.
尚未发起在线搜索。: No online search has been started yet.
左侧重新回到原版 Manage 的主入口：先选 profile，再决定应用或细调: The left side returns to the original Manage entry flow: pick a profile first, then decide whether to apply or fine-tune it.
已从磁盘 blacklist.txt 同步回 profile {profileN: Synchronized profile {profileName} from blacklist.txt on disk.
已写入 {profileCount} 个 profile 的 blacklist: Wrote into {profileCount} profile blacklists and reapplied {profileName}.
已发现 {count} 个 Celeste 安装目录，可直接载入业务层。: Detected {count} Celeste installation directories that can be loaded directly into the workspace.
已发送启动请求，请切回桌面会话查看游戏窗口。: Launch request sent. Switch back to your desktop session to check the game window.
已取消 {modName} 的 Always On，并重新应用 {profile: Removed Always On from {modName} and reapplied {profileName}.
已将 {modName} 设为 Always On，并重新应用 {profile: Set {modName} to Always On and reapplied {profileName}.
已清空 {profileName} 的 modoptionsorder，将回退到: Cleared modoptionsorder for {profileName}; alphabetical order will be used instead.
已请求打开当前工作区的 Mods 文件夹。: Requested to open the Mods folder for the current workspace.
已自动载入检测到的 Celeste 目录: {gamePath}。: Automatically loaded the detected Celeste directory: {gamePath}.
已安装 Everest，当前检测版本 {version}。: Everest installed. The currently detected version is {version}.
帮助观察附近收集品与草莓状态。: Helps inspect nearby collectibles and strawberry state.
当前 profile 记录 {blacklistCount} 个 blackli: The current profile contains {blacklistCount} blacklist entries, with {alwaysOnCount} overridden by Always On, and {orderCount} modoptionsorder entries.
当前先把地图与模组分流。下一步会继续补图像卡片、氛围图和更接近原版推荐地图页的展: Maps and mods are split for now. Next up is adding image cards, atmosphere artwork, and a presentation flow closer to the original featured maps page.
当前发现 {count} 项缺失或版本不足的硬依赖。: Currently found {count} missing or insufficient hard dependencies.
当前已被标记为 Always On，应用 profile 到磁盘时会强制保持启用: This mod is marked as Always On and will be forced to stay enabled when applying a profile to disk.

当前还没有 Always On Mod。可在右侧 Mod 列表中逐项切换。: There are no Always On mods yet. Toggle them one by one from the mod list on the right.
当前还没有可用 profile。: There are no available profiles yet.
当前还没有安装、更新或依赖修复任务。: There are no install, update, or dependency repair tasks yet.
当前这一组推荐模组都已经安装。: All recommended mods in this group are already installed.
当前默认内置简体中文和 English，同时支持从本地目录加载玩家自定义翻译包。: The app currently ships with Simplified Chinese and English, and also supports loading custom translation packs from a local directory.
当前默认开启，用于规避 WebKitGTK 在 Wayland 下的协议错误。: This is enabled by default to work around WebKitGTK protocol errors under Wayland.
手动安装、在线安装、推荐批量安装、更新和依赖修复都会在这里汇总，不再只挂在搜索页: Manual installs, online installs, bulk recommended installs, updates, and dependency repairs are all summarized here instead of living only in the Search sidebar.
把 Celeste 的目录、模组和 profile 放回一条清晰工作流。: Bring Celeste directories, mods, and profiles back into one clear workflow.
把 JSON 翻译包放到上面的目录后，重启应用即可出现在语言列表里。: Drop a JSON translation pack into the directory above and restart the app to see it appear in the language list.
把地图入口重新独立出来。: Restore a dedicated entry point for maps.
按名称、文件名或依赖过滤: Filter by name, file name, or dependency
推荐安装完成：成功安装 {count} 项。: Recommended install complete: installed {count} items successfully.
推荐模组页应该是“装常用工具”和“装外观模组”的轻量入口，不该与搜索和管理混成一: The featured mods page should be a lightweight entry for common tools and cosmetic mods, not merged into Search and Manage.
提供大量玩法、视觉和参数改动选项。: Provides a wide range of gameplay, visual, and parameter tweaks.
搜索、安装，并用独立任务面板追踪状态。: Search, install, and track progress from an independent task panel.
搜索页重新回到“上方筛选、下方结果、旁边安装器”的桌面工作流。现在详情弹窗和独立: The Search page is back to the desktop workflow of filters on top, results below, and an installer beside them. Detail modals and the standalone task overlay are both restored, and category filtering now lives in the request layer instead of only filtering the current results view.
改走 0x0ade 的 banana mirror，更接近旧版默认海外线路。: Switch to the 0x0ade banana mirror, which is closer to the legacy default route for overseas users.
新模组会被追加到所有 profile 的 blacklist，然后重新应用当前磁: The new mod will be appended to every profile blacklist, then the current on-disk profile will be reapplied. Useful when you want a mod installed but disabled by default.
新模组安装后保持启用，不会修改任何 blacklist profile。: New mods stay enabled after install and do not modify any blacklist profiles.
显示 {filteredCount} / {totalCount} 个 Mod，: Showing {filteredCount} / {totalCount} mods, with {selectedCount} selected for deletion.
显示输入历史，方便排查手法问题。: Shows input history to help inspect execution problems.
最近已完成的安装或维护: Most recently completed installs or maintenance

节奏安静、完成度很高的独立地图。: A calm standalone map with very high polish.
补全时会优先尝试满足更高的版本需求。: Repair prefers satisfying higher version requirements first.

路径无效，未找到 Celeste 可执行文件。: Invalid path. No Celeste executable was found.
这里也接受直接粘贴 `Celeste` / `Celeste.exe`、`fil: You can also paste a `Celeste` / `Celeste.exe` path, a `file://` path, or a `~`-prefixed path here, and it will be normalized to the game directory automatically.
载入 Everest 列表失败: {error}: Failed to load the Everest release list: {error}
输入可直接下载的 Mod zip URL。后端会下载到临时文件，校验 `ever: Enter a directly downloadable mod zip URL. The backend downloads it to a temporary file, validates `everest.yaml`, then writes it into the current workspace `Mods/`.
还没有安装任务记录。之后无论从哪个页面发起安装、更新或依赖修复，都可以在这个独立: There are no install task records yet. Future installs, updates, and dependency repairs from any page will appear in this independent task panel.
适合大多数玩家，稳定版可跟随当前镜像设置。: Suitable for most players. The stable channel follows the current mirror setting.
这一页尽量向原版 Manage 收敛：左侧思维模式不再是“看所有调试信息”，而是: This page moves closer to the original Manage view: the left side is no longer about reading debug info, but about completing day-to-day actions like profiles, ordering, enable/disable, and deletion.
这些 Mod 会在任何 profile 应用到磁盘时被强制保留启用，不会写入 `: These mods are forced to stay enabled whenever a profile is applied to disk and will not be written into `blacklist.txt`.
这里保留版本和本地目录信息，避免把首页重新变回调试页。: Keep version and local path info here so Home does not regress into a debug page again.
这里回到原版首页的核心心智模型：先理解自己当前在用哪个 profile，再决定是: This returns to the original Home page mental model: first understand which profile you are using, then decide whether to switch, apply, or dive into Manage for deeper edits.
这里恢复原版首页里的下载镜像入口，并把设置真正接到搜索、更新与依赖补全链路里。: This restores the download mirror control from the original Home page and wires it into search, updates, and dependency repair for real.
这里直接读取 `Mods/blacklist.txt`，确认磁盘状态是否和当前已: Read `Mods/blacklist.txt` directly here to confirm whether disk state matches the currently applied profile.
这里编辑当前选中 profile 的 `modOptionsOrder`，并立即: Edit the selected profile `modOptionsOrder` here and write it into `Mods/modoptionsorder.txt` immediately.
通过 `wegfan` 搜索线上 Mod。当前保留关键字、排序、分页与一键安装，: Search online mods through `wegfan`. Keywords, sorting, paging, and one-click installs remain, and category filtering now happens in the request layer so paging and totals change together with the filter.
这里按当前已安装的同名分组解析依赖，方便直接看出缺失、版本不足和未启用的链路。: Dependencies are resolved here by the currently installed same-name groups so you can directly spot missing, outdated, and disabled links.
推荐地图页现在重新回到“先看封面和氛围，再决定装哪张图”的节奏，不再只是文本列表: The recommended maps page is back to a flow of checking cover art and mood first, then deciding what to install, instead of being just a text list.
大型图包和代表性独立地图先独立成图像卡片页，先看气质、体量和难度，再决定是否安装: Large collabs and representative standalone maps now live on an image-card page so you can judge vibe, scale, and difficulty before installing.
这一页继续向原版 Manage 收敛：左侧处理 profile，右侧直接看同名分: This page continues moving toward the original Manage flow: profiles on the left, same-name groups, duplicate packs, dependency chains, and local notes on the right.
把联机流程拆成安装、注册和登录三个步骤。: Split the multiplayer flow into installation, registration, and in-game login.
先补回原版的群服入口，同时把 Miao.CelesteNet.Client /: Restore the original multiplayer entry point while putting Miao.CelesteNet.Client / CelesteNet.Client installation and status onto one page.
先回到主页载入 Celeste 目录，再处理联机 Mod 和账号流程。: Return to Home, load a Celeste directory, then continue with multiplayer mods and account setup.
先安装 Everest，再配置联机 Mod。: Install Everest first, then configure multiplayer mods.
面向 celemiao 中文群服的联机客户端。: The multiplayer client aimed at the celemiao Chinese server ecosystem.
如果你打算走中文论坛注册和中文群服，这条就是主路线。: If you plan to use the Chinese forum registration flow and Chinese servers, this is the primary route.
上游通用联机客户端，适合不走中文群服的时候使用。: The upstream generic multiplayer client, suitable when you are not using the Chinese server route.
如果你只是想保留通用 CelesteNet 兼容入口，可以装这条。: Install this if you simply want to keep a generic CelesteNet-compatible entry point.
国内环境下辅助游戏内下载与更新的镜像支持。: Mirror support that helps in-game downloads and updates work better inside mainland network conditions.
如果你走国内网络环境，这个辅助组件通常值得一起装。: If you are playing under mainland network conditions, this helper is usually worth installing as well.
建议注册后回到游戏，在 Mod 设置里完成服务器地址、账号和令牌登录。: After registration, return to the game and finish server address, account, and token login in Mod Settings.
启动游戏后，在 Mod 设置里启用并登录对应联机 Mod。: After launching the game, enable and log into the corresponding multiplayer mod from Mod Settings.
中文群服当前沿用论坛工作流。先注册，再在游戏里登录。: The Chinese server flow still uses the forum workflow: register first, then log in from inside the game.
除了主路线，这里也把通用 CelesteNet 和国内镜像辅助一起放出来，避免你: Besides the main route, this page also exposes generic CelesteNet and the domestic mirror helper so you do not have to dig through Search again.
把联机 Mod 设成 Always On: Set Multiplayer Mod as Always On
如果当前 profile 会切联机 Mod，建议把它设成 Always On，避: If your current profiles toggle multiplayer mods, set them as Always On so they do not get disabled by accident after switching profiles.
同名重复包会在这里按一组显示，避免 UI 和后端按名操作的语义继续错位。: Duplicate packages with the same name are shown as one group here so the UI no longer drifts away from the backend's name-based actions.
同名重复包会在黑名单、Always On 和删除动作里按整组处理。: Duplicate packages with the same name are handled as one group by blacklist, Always On, and deletion actions.
当前没有其他 Mod 依赖它。: No other mods currently depend on it.
给这个 Mod 留一条本地备注。: Leave a local note for this mod.
备注只保存在当前 CeleMod 本地配置里，不会写进 Mod 包或 profi: Notes are only stored in the local CeleMod config and are not written into the mod package or profile files.
一眼能认出来的国风美术和更浓的策展感。: Distinct Chinese-style art with a stronger curated feel.
大厅氛围和转场设计很强，适合想看风格化地图的人。: The lobby mood and transitions are strong, great for players who want heavily stylized maps.
覆盖多个难度层，但整体节奏比超大图包更紧凑。: It spans multiple difficulty tiers, but the pacing is tighter than ultra-large collabs.
如果想先体验中文社区审美，这张图很值得先装。: If you want to sample the Chinese community's aesthetic first, this one is worth installing early.
最完整、最像“Celeste 社区主入口”的大型图包之一。: One of the most complete large collabs, and one of the closest things to a Celeste community front door.
大厅和地图数量都极其夸张，适合长期慢慢打。: The lobby and map count are enormous, making it ideal for a long-term playthrough.
从 Beginner 到 Grandmaster 都有清晰梯度。: It offers a clear ladder from Beginner to Grandmaster.
配套教学、音乐和场景完成度都很高。: Its teaching maps, music, and environments are all highly polished.
老牌但仍然很稳，入门和回坑都好用。: An older collab, but still very solid for beginners and returnees.
章节结构清晰，适合作为大型图包的第一站。: Its chapter structure is clean, making it a good first stop among large collabs.
比 Strawberry Jam 更早、更朴素，但路线组织依旧扎实。: It is earlier and plainer than Strawberry Jam, but the route design is still sturdy.
适合想要大量社区关卡、又不想一上来就被难度劝退的人。: Great for players who want a lot of community levels without immediately getting pushed away by difficulty.
冷色氛围更重，路线和关卡体力活也更绵长。: It leans harder into cold colors, with longer routes and more endurance-heavy rooms.
如果你已经打过几套经典 collab，这套很适合继续往下接。: If you have already played a few classic collabs, this one is a good next step.
整体气质更冷、更耐打，长线体验很好。: Its overall vibe is colder and more durable, with a strong long-form experience.
适合喜欢雪景、夜色和更沉一点配色的人。: A good fit for players who like snow scenes, night palettes, and a heavier atmosphere.
不是最吵的那种名作，但气氛和音乐都很稳。: It is not the loudest famous map, but its atmosphere and music are consistently strong.
适合想打一张完整单图、又不想立刻进超长图包的人。: Great for players who want one complete standalone map without diving into a massive collab right away.
风景和路线都偏平和，完成后记忆点很强。: Its scenery and routing are calm, but it leaves a strong memory after completion.
A 面强度不算离谱，但后续内容依然有技术要求。: The A-side is not absurdly hard, but later content still demands technique.
老牌硬图，气质很锋利，不是休闲观光路线。: A classic hard map with a sharp tone; it is not a casual sightseeing route.
适合已经有一定 mod 图经验，想找更聚焦挑战的玩家。: It suits players who already have some mod-map experience and want a more focused challenge.
路线密度高，失误反馈直接，属于会留下肌肉记忆的图。: The routing is dense and mistakes are punished clearly, making it the kind of map that leaves muscle memory.
如果你想从“大型合集”切回“高压单图”，可以从这里开始。: If you want to move from big compilations back to a high-pressure standalone, start here.
重启应用后完全生效。: Fully takes effect after restarting the app.
首页现在重新承担原版 CeleMod 的入口角色：先选目录，再决定 profil: Home now resumes the original CeleMod entry role: pick a directory first, decide on a profile, then move into Search, Manage, and Recommendations instead of flattening all state into one long panel.
当前工作区已经同步目录、Everest 与 profile。可以直接启动游戏，或: The current workspace has already synced the directory, Everest, and profile. You can launch the game immediately or continue with installs and maintenance.
先锁定 Celeste 目录，再把搜索、管理和 profile 工作流接回同一块: Lock in a Celeste directory first, then bring search, management, and profile workflow back onto one cohesive desktop.
未载入时仍可先在下方控制台输入目录。: Even when nothing is loaded yet, you can still enter a directory in the console below first.
当前没有检测到缺失依赖。: No missing dependencies were detected right now.
当前没有管理类维护任务。: There are no manage-side maintenance tasks right now.
当前没有已结束任务。: There are no finished tasks yet.
